summary: Bryan Cantrill announces the birth of his second son, Alexander Morgan Gaffikin Cantrill, born on June 17th, 2007. The post is a brief, joyful announcement noting the baby's impressive birth weight of 9 pounds, 7 ounces. Cantrill reflects humorously on how much he's forgotten about infant care in the nearly three years since his first son was born.
key_points: Alexander Morgan Gaffikin Cantrill was born June 17, 2007
The baby weighed 9 pounds, 7 ounces and arrived five days early
This is Cantrill's second child, nearly three years after his first son Tobin
money_quotes: It's amazing how much one forgets over nearly three years; I've found myself cramming on forgotten (if simple) ideas like burping and 'tummy time'.
But I can still swaddle like an all-pro!
key_insight: A personal announcement celebrating new fatherhood and the humbling experience of relearning infant care basics.
